nodes.name: Overnight Watch Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires every 30 min, 6PM-9:25AM ET Mon-Fri. Set active hours in cron: 22:00-13:25 UTC.

nodes.name: Weekend Watch Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires every 2 hours on Saturday and Sunday for crypto + geopolitical coverage.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: On-demand testing and emergency override.

nodes.name: Overnight Market Data
nodes.notes: Fetches 15 symbols. Symbol failures skip, workflow continues.

nodes.name: News Scanner
nodes.notes: Finnhub key required. Add HUNTER H30 Finnhub API key. Failure safe — empty alerts if down.

nodes.name: Threshold Engine
nodes.notes: GREEN/YELLOW/RED determination. All thresholds match IRONCLAD v2.0 + METATRON v10.7.

nodes.name: Overnight Report Builder
nodes.notes: HTML Telegram message. Escape < > & in dynamic fields to prevent parse errors.

nodes.name: Escalation Router
nodes.notes: GREEN → silent log only. YELLOW/RED → Telegram alert.

nodes.name: Gabriel Alert
nodes.notes: hunter_a2e_bot. Same credential as SENTINEL.

nodes.name: RED Escalation
nodes.notes: RED only: fire email + CIL webhook. YELLOW falls through to logger.

nodes.name: RED Alert Email
nodes.notes: ashes2echoes.platform@gmail.com. RED escalation only.

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: ={{ 'GABRIEL RED ALERT ' + new Date().toISOString().substring(0,16).replace('T',' ') + ' ET. Triggers: ' + JSON.stringify($('Overnight Report Builder').first().json.triggers.red) + '. Recommend market open posture.' }}

nodes.name: CIL Analysis Request
nodes.notes: Set CIL_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n variables. Pull from CIL v5.2.1 webhook node URL. RED only.

nodes.name: Gabriel Logger
nodes.notes: Writes every run to Supabase gabriel_overnight_log. Table must exist before first run. See SQL in spec.

nodes.name: Morning Brief Trigger
nodes.notes: 8:00 AM ET = 12:00 UTC. Monday-Friday only. Independent chain.

nodes.name: Morning Brief
nodes.notes: Reads last 12h from Supabase. Fresh pre-market fetch. Posture: RISK-ON/NEUTRAL/RISK-OFF.

nodes.name: Morning Brief Delivery
nodes.notes: 8:00 AM ET delivery. hunter_a2e_bot. Sets Principal posture before market open.
